topics.title: Staff Weight Loss Competition
topics.summary: The studio hosts a weigh-in contest where staff members compete to win a prize from Solaris, resulting in Benji winning after losing the highest percentage of body weight through extreme measures.

topics.title: Weight Loss Competition Results and Miami Trip
topics.summary: The studio records a discussion regarding the results of a weight loss competition, accusations of cheating by a winner named Benji, and Artie’s recent experiences in Miami.

topics.title: Medical Concerns and Tour Anecdotes
topics.summary: The studio discusses a guest's medical condition involving a severe infection, the logistics of touring with limited facilities, and various anecdotes from recent performances.

topics.title: Spider-Man and Superman Film Critiques
topics.summary: The studio discusses the cinematic differences between Spider-Man and Superman, focusing on repetitive storylines in superhero films and the commercial success of the latest Spider-Man installment.

topics.title: Roger Clemens Returns to the Yankees
topics.summary: The studio discusses Roger Clemens' return to the New York Yankees, debating his legacy as a pitcher and the implications of his high-value contract.

topics.title: Breast Surgery and Weight Loss Results
topics.summary: The studio features a guest presenting a check for a weight loss contest winner and a woman discussing her transition from saline to silicone breast implants with a medical professional.

topics.title: Media Consolidation and the Bigfoot Match Game
topics.summary: The studio discusses the implications of media ownership by Rupert Murdoch, the specific challenges regarding the XM Sirius merger, and a listener participates in a trivia game to win money.

topics.title: Guest Appearances and Trivia Games
topics.summary: The show features a guest discussing their role on the series Rescue Me, followed by a segment of trivia questions regarding pop culture and celebrities.

topics.title: Host's Lifestyle and Relationship Dynamics
topics.summary: The studio explores the host's personal life, his relationship with Beth, and the impact of his demanding work schedule on his social habits.

topics.title: Don Imus Lawsuit and Pop Culture Commentary
topics.summary: The studio discusses the legal ramifications of Don Imus's contract, the cultural impact of the song "Too Sexy," and various pop culture topics including Spider-Man and David Hasselhoff.

topics.title: Host's Alcohol Consumption and Travel Anecdotes
topics.summary: The show features a segment where the host discusses his alcohol consumption, an incident involving a flight from Los Angeles, and various stories regarding guests and past scripts.

topics.title: Entertainment News and Celebrity Updates
topics.summary: The studio covers a variety of topics including celebrity legal issues, television industry shifts to digital broadcasting, and reports on intoxicated driving involving high-profile figures.

topics.title: Sports News and Corporate Earnings
topics.summary: The show covers a St. Louis Cardinals pitcher's fatal accident, CBS's quarterly earnings decline due to radio station sales, reports on NBA officiating discrimination, and an incident involving a baseball player in New York.
